title: Environment Situation Arc
html:
Stub. The environment-situation-arc — Yahir's recurring re-litigation of "who am I in proximity to and is it raising or lowering me." The honest dated origin point is 2023 01 31 environment situation (Yahir admits the core fellas aren't the "elevation circle"); the resolution is the 2025 Austin move.

Likely tributaries:

  • 2022 10 15 relationships and fitting in — pressure-from-fellas, romantic-pairing version
  • 2023 09 25 life of obscurity — the peer-comparison-via-social-media variant
  • The post-China decision sequence (2024-2025) — when leaving the OSU social context becomes acted-on

Promote-on-3rd surfacing as a synthesis page candidate; the structure (proximity-as-ceiling → roster-of-disqualified-alternatives → eventual-geographic-exit) is too narrative-rich to leave as a stub once a 4th source confirms it.

related.label: Environment situation (Jan 2023 housing-pivot — the fellas aren't the elevation circle)
